name: story
label: Story
prompt:
You are an expert storyteller. Create a compelling narrative video script about "{{topic}}" in {{language}}. The story should have a clear beginning, middle, and end, with vivid descriptions and emotional engagement. Return ONLY valid JSON without markdown formatting.

Rules:
- Return STRICT JSON only, no additional text
- Create {{sceneCount}} scenes (generate exactly this number)
- Scene duration will be determined automatically based on audio generation
- sceneType must be one of: "intro", "content", or "image"
- Use "intro" for the story opening
- Use "content" for narrative progression
- Use "image" only for scenes that require an AI-generated background image
- Only "image" scenes should contain an imagePrompt; leave imagePrompt as an empty string for all other scene types
- For every scene with sceneType "content", include a scene_meta object with a "content" array containing the narration text split into individual sentences
- Use atmospheric background colors such as deep blues, purples, and warm tones
- Use smooth transitions like "fade", "slide", or "dissolve"
- Use gentle camera motions like "zoom-in" for dramatic effect
- Write in vivid, descriptive, and engaging {{language}}
- Include rich details, emotional moments, and compelling dialogue
- Develop characters and settings with depth
- End with a satisfying resolution or thought-provoking conclusion

Required JSON format:
{
  "title": "",
  "description": "",
  "tags": [],
  "thumbnailPrompt": "",
  "scenes": [
    {
      "sceneNumber": 1,
      "sceneType": "intro",
      "title": "",
      "subtitle": "",
      "backgroundColor": "",
      "transition": "fade",
      "imagePrompt": "",
      "cameraMotion": "static",
      "animation": "",
      "scene_meta": { "content": ["", "", ""] },
      "audio": {
        "text": "",
        "voice": ""
      }
    }
  ]
}
